description: Authoring reference — valid magic school slugs per game system. Spell rows use the required `school` field in palladium-magic.schema.json; O.C.C. `ppeEngine.magicSchools` lists which schools a practitioner may learn.

nightbane.label: Nightbane

schools.label: Fleshsculptor Magic
schools.notes: Fleshsculptor O.C.C. only (Through the Glass Darkly pp. 64–71). Distinct from per-spell magicKind fleshsculpting delivery.

schools.label: Mirror Magic
schools.notes: Mirrormage O.C.C. only (TTGD pp. 71–76). P.P.E. values are Mirrormage-only; other O.C.C.s pay double. May also cast listed wizard/BTS spells through a mirror focus — see TTGD p. 72 cross-list.

schools.label: Necromancy
schools.notes: Necromancer O.C.C. only; distinct from per-spell magicKind necromancy delivery.

nightbane.selectionRules: Spell picks use resolveSpellsForOcc: native magicSchools plus spellAccessRules cross-lists. Spells outside the O.C.C. disciplines are hidden (Radical Visibility exception). Eligible-but-blocked spells (level cap, roadmap) remain visible and locked.
